---
title: "In-Class Exercise 1:</br>"
author: "CHUA Wee Tian"
date: "April 18, 2026"
date-modified: "last-modified"
execute: 
  eval: true
  echo: true
  warning: false
  freeze: true
---

## 1.1 In-Class Exercise 1 Learning Outcome

::: {style="text-align: right;"}
[***Next: In-Class Exercise 2***](./IC_Ex2.html)
:::
